penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the time limit. Final frame shows partial circle with remaining connections.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reports incomplete circle at maximum time (300s) while GPT reports completion at 112s. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, the more conservative incomplete assessment is adopted.

disagreements.rationale: Fundamental disagreement on task completion. If the task was truly incomplete at maximum time, this takes precedence over any claimed early completion time.

claude_value.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the time limit. Final frame shows partial circle with remaining connections.

gpt_value.description: Cut deviated outside the marked circle in one visible segment.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete circle is an automatic-zero condition that supersedes line deviation penalties. If the circle was truly incomplete, this is the controlling penalty.
If the circle was incomplete as determined above, then circle_release phase could not have occurred.
Incomplete circle results in automatic zero score regardless of time or other penalties.
